description: Agent Harness V1 context dependency graph - Updated 2026-05-14 R11: Comprehensive security audit (4 rounds, 23 fixes) covering SQL injection/XSS/Docker/Dependencies. Ollama removed from docker-compose.yml. Frontend security hardened (emptyState escapeHtml, edit-org attribute escaping). Dream scheduler self-call refactored to direct downstream service calls. LiteLLM model hardcoded fallback removed. .env.example deduplicated. ARCHITECTURE.md gateway endpoint table expanded 5→22 entries.

L1_execution: development/DEV-15-控制台优化与标准测试故事线.md
L2_governance: AH1-25-研发里程碑与任务拆解.md
AH1-33-文档关系与一致性清单.md

fix_changelog.2026-05-06-R1: Security + Syntax: 9 fixes (app.js const→let x3, limiter LRU, security-check throw, code-executor retry, fact content truncation, reviewFact optimistic lock, writeEntities relation limit, gateway pool null-check)
fix_changelog.2026-05-06-R2: Security + Robustness: 7 fixes (identity-resolver logger, file-validator magic bytes, session-mapper type guards, generic-executor context truncation+retry+log safety, embedding fallback logging, postJson dedup verified stale)
fix_changelog.2026-05-06-R3: Storyline Alignment: 4 fixes (workflow concurrent limit TC-F002-05, gateway binding check AH1-21§21.4.4, generic-executor 7 stage types AH1-01§2.3, workflow org_id persistence AH1-19)
fix_changelog.2026-05-06-R4: Doc/Graph Sync: context-graph.json v1.7→1.8, DEV-08 updated, fix-changelog created, source_to_authority mapping added
fix_changelog.2026-05-06-R5: Comprehensive audit fixes: authority_map corrections, layer classification for AH1-13/AH1-27, security-check authority expanded
fix_changelog.2026-05-08-R6: Graph Sync Round 2: DEV-08 version sync (v1.1→v1.8), context-routing.json task_routes naming aligned (M1-M5 prefix convention), authority_map['resource'] corrected from AH1-31→AH1-26 (Provider/Budget L0 authority)
fix_changelog.2026-05-11-R7: Security Audit Remediation Sync: S-03 verifyInternalAuth fail-closed, S-07 default password blocked, A-05 storage.use_ssl=true, S-05 container ID sanitization, S-08 docker-compose.prod.yml env overrides, A-06 Docker network split (agent-harness-backend internal), A-01 config.schema.json expanded (40+ fields). Object-relationship-graph.md v2.3 topology updated with network isolation diagram.
fix_changelog.2026-05-12-R8: Doc/Graph Consistency Fix: ARCHITECTURE.md v2026-05-12 (section 17 expanded from 21→50 entries, added fireAndForget + clearHealthChecks design patterns), object-relationship-graph.md v2.4 (section 10 expanded + full test inventory 16 suites/209 tests), context-graph.json v2.0 (source_to_authority expanded 12→18 entries including gateway-state, retry/strategy, logging/logger, metrics/metrics, monitoring/health), context-routing.json v1.5 (added test file paths in conditional allow). All discrepancies between docs, graphs, and code resolved.
fix_changelog.2026-05-12-R9: Context Injection Precision Upgrade: Created context-object-routes.json v1.0 (23 files→57 functions with line ranges + 14 debug scenarios + token budgets + purpose/authority_section metadata). Upgraded context-graph.json v2.1 (added token_budgets per task profile and per file type + object_routes reference). Upgraded context-routing.json v1.6 (added object_routes_file link + bootstrap doc). This enables function-level context injection instead of whole-file loading during development and debugging.
fix_changelog.2026-05-13-R10: Hermes Adapter Refactoring Sync: Added 4 new source files (memory-repository.ts, skill-repository.ts, memory-analysis-repository.ts, memory-service.ts) to source_to_authority mapping with correct authority doc references. Upgraded context-graph.json v2.1→v2.2. Synchronized with context-object-routes.json v1.1 and ARCHITECTURE.md 2026-05-13.
fix_changelog.2026-05-14-R11: Comprehensive Multi-Round Security & Logic Audit (4 rounds, 23 fixes total): R1 (Doc/Code Consistency) — ARCHITECTURE.md gateway endpoint table 5→22 entries, .env.example LITELLM_MASTER_KEY dedup, showToast const→let fix, task_dispatch localhost self-call eliminated via assignTaskInternal/notifyTaskInternal extraction, feishu reply all-failed warning. R2 (Graph Sync) — context-object-routes.json 14 function line ranges recalibrated +55~68 offset, assignTaskInternal/notifyTaskInternal added. R3 (UX Logic) — doAssignOrg sending username→now sends user.id UUID, Dream Scheduler HTTP self-call removed (now direct fetchFromService to hermes/skill-library). R4 (Security Deep Audit) — Docker floating tags pinned (ollama removed entirely, litellm:main-latest→main-v1.74.4-stable), Redis healthcheck -a flag→REDISCLI_AUTH env var, ADMIN_PASSWORD empty→default_admin_changeme, emptyState() icon escapeHtml hardening, showEditOrg numeric fields escapeHtml, LiteLLM model hardcoded fallback removed. context-object-routes.json v1.1→v1.2 (73 functions, 14 debug scenarios).
fix_changelog.graph_check: context-graph.json v2.2 valid | context-routing.json v1.6 valid | context-object-routes.json v1.1 valid (66 objects, 71 functions, 14 debug scenarios)
